name: Peter Kay
bio: Peter Kay is an English comedian, writer and actor from Bolton known for warm, observational comedy drawn from northern working-class life. He won Channel 4s So You Think Youre Funny in 1997 and gained mainstream fame with the sitcom Phoenix Nights and his live show Live at the Top of the Tower. His arena tours are among the most commercially successful in stand-up history.

timeline.ev: Wins Channel 4s So You Think Youre Funny contest
Achieves mainstream fame with Live at the Top of the Tower
Co-writes and stars in the sitcom Phoenix Nights
Awarded a Rose dOr at the Montreux television festival
Tour enters the Guinness Book as the most successful stand-up tour ever
Returns to live arena touring after a long break

accolades: Rose dOr for Best Performance by an Actor (2005)
Guinness World Record for most successful stand-up comedy tour (2012)

specials.t: Live at the Top of the Tower
Live at the Bolton Albert Halls
The Tour That Didnt Tour Tour
